title: elaphrium tenuifolium
intro: Elaphrium tenuifolium, also known as the Tassy Rue or False Rue, is a perennial plant species in the family Boraginaceae, characterized by its delicate leaves and small, blue-purple flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Elaphrium tenuifolium include its ability to soothe coughs, relieve congestion, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy. Elaphrium tenuifolium can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for easy consumption and utilization of its medicinal properties.
